CVE-2016-4982.title: authd sets weak permissions for /etc/ident.key, which allows loca ...
CVE-2016-4982.description: authd sets weak permissions for /etc/ident.key, which allows local users to obtain the key by leveraging a race condition between the creation of the key, and the chmod to protect it.
